headline: CONTROL EVERY SUPPLIER CHANGE
subheading: Receive, triage and close vendor change notifications under EU GMP and GDP with confidence.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial illustration of controlled supply-chain change management in pharmaceutical quality, set against a deep navy background. A luminous network of interconnected nodes and flowing lines streams in from the left edge, representing supplier change signals entering a quality system; the lines converge into a series of clean concentric gateways and filtering checkpoints rendered in teal and cyan, where flows are sorted, risk-tiered and channelled. Glowing cyan data pulses travel along the pathways while a single subtle green accent marks an approved, closed change at the far right. Layered translucent geometric panels suggest documented assessment, audit trails and traceability, with faint grid textures and soft bokeh particles adding depth. Minimalist clinical-luxury aesthetic, precise and premium, calm and ordered composition with shallow depth of field and elegant negative space. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
